summary: Adjusted the chapter exit so Ren's chip handoff, disappearance, and the crew's silent withdrawal now track cleanly into the chapter 11 boundary while preserving the existing confrontation and reveal beats.
edits: Changed Ren's chip delivery from a courtyard drop to a hand-to-hand palm into Faye's fist.
Shifted Ren's exit from the rooftop route to a sideways disappearance through the market crowd.
Kept the chip with Faye and added a quiet walk-back beat to support the next chapter opening.
